prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低位次分别为约22345→24474→25969→29684→38811名，连续5年持续后移，累计后移约16466名；其中2024→2025年单年后移约9127名， 降幅显著扩大，显示竞争持续加剧趋势；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年81人、2022年124人、2023年128人、2024年138人、2025年139人，逐年扩招；2026 年综合类119人+医学类18人合计137人，较2025年139人微幅缩招约1.4%，对竞争影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大 学排名2021年第86名→2022年第88名→2023年第87名→2024年第86名→2025年第88名→2026年第92名，近年排名略有下滑但仍稳定在86–92名区间，属中上水平省属重点师范院校；2025年声誉评价为偏负面（文学院教授师德师风事件），2026年周期内无重大声誉事件；抖音热度排名第100位（样本14条），评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光度处 于中低水平，无明显报考热度助推信号；2021–2025年均无投档线断档或暴跌记录；第五轮学科评估中，湖南师范大学A-及以上学科仅外国语言文学（A-）1个， A-及以上学科数量少于10个；该校师范类主干学科如教育学、中国语言文学等虽未进入A类但在全国有一定影响力，对相关专业报考有基本吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/ 教育类专业社会热度2021年"分化观望"（53.18）→2022年"推荐"（70.76，明显升温）→2023年"分化观望"（63.81，小幅降温）→2024年"分化观望"（55.84），整体呈降温趋势；计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业持续高热，但该校工科实力相对一般；浙江省2026年考生总数400,000人，较2025年290,790人增长约37.6%，竞争显著加剧；省 控线近年稳定在488–497分之间，无明显波动；湖南师范大学位于湖南省长沙市，在浙江省属外省招生；该校在浙江省招生人数占其全国总招生比例较低（2025 年约5.6%），浙江考生报考该校需考虑跨省地域偏好，省外师范类院校在浙江的吸引力相对有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：历年位次持续后移趋势明确、2026年浙江省考 生总数大幅增加约37.6%使竞争加剧、招生计划微幅缩招、学校排名略有下滑、声誉热度一般，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准38811名基础上继续后移但幅度收窄；预测最 低位次约38276名，区间37776–38776名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Zhejiang Comprehensive category were approximately 22345 → 24474 → 25969 → 29684 → 38811, continuously declining for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative decline of about 16466 places; from 2024 to 2025, the single-year decline was about 9127 places, showing a significant expansion of the decline, indicating a trend of intensifying competition; the university's enrollment plan for Zhejiang Comprehensive category was 81 in 2021, 124 in 2022, 128 in 2023, 138 in 2024, and 139 in 2025, with annual expansion; in 2026, the Comprehensive category has 119 places plus Medical category 18 places, totaling 137 places, a slight reduction of about 1.4% compared to 139 in 2025, with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. According to the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 86th in 2021 → 88th in 2022 → 87th in 2023 → 86th in 2024 → 88th in 2025 → 92nd in 2026. In recent years, the ranking has slightly declined but remains stable in the 86–92 range, belonging to the upper-middle level provincial key normal university; in 2025, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (incident involving a professor from the College of Liberal Arts regarding teacher ethics), and no major reputation incidents occurred in the 2026 cycle; Douyin popularity ranked 100th (sample of 14 posts), with an evaluation of "average", indicating low to medium exposure on short video platforms, with no obvious signal boosting application popularity; from 2021 to 2025, there were no records of cutoff line breaks or sharp drops; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hunan Normal University had only one A- or above discipline: Foreign Languages and Literature (A-), with fewer than 10 A- or above disciplines; although the university's main normal disciplines such as Education and Chinese Language and Literature did not enter the A category, they have certain influence nationwide, providing basic appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of normal/education majors showed a trend of "differentiated wait-and-see" (53.18) in 2021 → "recommended" (70.76, significant warming) in 2022 → "differentiated wait-and-see" (63.81, slight cooling) in 2023 → "differentiated wait-and-see" (55.84) in 2024, overall cooling; engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly popular, but the university's engineering strength is relatively average; the total number of examinees in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is 400,000, an increase of about 37.6% compared to 290,790 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the provincial control line has been stable between 488–497 points in recent years, with no significant fluctuations; Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, and recruits students from outside the province in Zhejiang; the proportion of the university's enrollment in Zhejiang to its total national enrollment is relatively low (about 5.6% in 2025), and Zhejiang examinees applying to this university need to consider cross-provincial regional preferences, as the appeal of out-of-province normal universities in Zhejiang is relatively limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors: the historical rankings show a clear continuous decline trend, the total number of examinees in Zhejiang Province in 2026 has significantly increased by about 37.6%, intensifying competition, the enrollment plan is slightly reduced, the university's ranking has slightly declined, and reputation popularity is average. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to decline from the 2025 baseline of 38811, but the decline will narrow; the predicted minimum ranking is about 38276, with a range of 37776–38776.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For examinees with rankings within the predicted range of 37776–38776, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety; for those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 37000), they can focus on applying for popular majors in Tier 1 such as Chinese Language and Literature (Normal) and Law; for those with rankings close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 38500), it is recommended to mainly choose employment-oriented majors in Tier 2 such as Mathematics, Computer Science, and Accounting, and use Tier 3 majors such as Chemical Engineering as safety. Although the university's normal majors are its characteristics, social popularity is divided. It is recommended to choose based on personal career plans.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 湖南师范大学在浙江省医学类单独招生，2021-2025年最低录取位次分别为22176、22646、23046、97261、38811。2021-2023年位次稳定在2.2万-2.3万区间，逐年小幅下滑（位 次数字增大，竞争略缓）。2024年因预防医学专业位次暴跌至97261，拉低整体最低位次至97261，出现异常波动。2025年大幅回升至38811，临床医学（33926）和药学（38811） 两个专业招生。招生计划方面，2021年8人、2022年12人、2023年14人、2024年20人、2025年18人，呈先扩后稳趋势。2026年计划为18人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南师范大学位于湖南省长沙市，是211工程重点建设高校、国家双一流建设高校，办学层次为本科公办，学校类型为师范类。作为湖南省属重点师范大学，其医学部依托学校综 合实力，在师范类院校中医学专业具有一定特色和认可度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在浙江省考生中持续保持较高报考热度，临床医学尤为突出。湖南师范大学医学部在浙江仅招收临床医学和药学两个专业，招生规模较小（18人），竞争相对集中。2 025年位次较2021-2023年明显下降，反映出医学类专业在省外师范类院校中的吸引力有所波动，但临床医学位次仍维持在3.4万以内，显示核心专业热度不减。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算（计划持平，供需弹性为0）及历年位次趋势分析，2026年湖南师范大学医学类在浙江省最低录取位次预计为38411名，较2025年（38811）小幅提升（更 难进），反映2024年异常波动后位次持续回归趋势。波动区间为37911-38911，建议考生在此区间内合理规划志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Hunan Normal University offers independent enrollment in Medicine in Zhejiang Province. From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings were 22176, 22646, 23046, 97261, and 38811 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, rankings stabilized in the 22,000-23,000 range, with a slight year-on-year decline (ranking numbers increased, competition slightly eased). In 2024, due to a sharp drop in the Preventive Medicine major ranking to 97261, the overall minimum ranking was pulled down to 97261, showing abnormal fluctuation. In 2025, it rebounded significantly to 38811, with two majors enrolling: Clinical Medicine (33926) and Pharmacy (38811). In terms of enrollment plan, 8 students in 2021, 12 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 18 in 2025, showing a trend of first expansion then stabilization. The 2026 plan is 18 students, unchanged from 2025, with no impact from expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province. It is a key construction university under the 211 Project and a national Double First-Class construction university. Its education level is undergraduate public, and its school type is normal. As a key normal university under Hunan Province, its medical department relies on the comprehensive strength of the university, and its medical majors have certain characteristics and recognition among normal universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to maintain high application popularity among Zhejiang Province candidates, with Clinical Medicine being particularly prominent. Hunan Normal University's medical department only enrolls two majors in Zhejiang: Clinical Medicine and Pharmacy, with a small enrollment scale (18 students), making competition relatively concentrated. The 2025 ranking significantly decreased compared to 2021-2023, reflecting some fluctuation in the attractiveness of medical majors in out-of-province normal universities, but the Clinical Medicine ranking still remains within 34,000, indicating that the core major's popularity remains strong.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation (plan unchanged, supply-demand elasticity is 0) and historical ranking trend analysis, the minimum admission ranking for Hunan Normal University's Medicine category in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is predicted to be 38411, a slight increase (harder to enter) compared to 2025 (38811), reflecting the continuous regression trend after the abnormal fluctuation in 2024. The fluctuation range is 37911-38911. It is recommended that candidates plan their applications reasonably within this range.

Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Pharmacy as the main choice and Tier 1 Clinical Medicine as a reach. Since only two majors are enrolling, pay attention to the order of major preferences when applying.
